GraceMigrationReport.Source: Initial migration used pre-migration XML docs that were later deleted, plus package.json and README.md for current package metadata.
GraceMigrationReport.Approval: User explicitly approved writing .grace artifacts after migration draft.

MigrationFindings.Finding: Pre-migration XML docs had version drift across requirements, technology, development, graph, verification, and operational packet artifacts. Current GRACE 4 files use graceVersion 4.0.
Some pre-migration docs contained references not present in current package exports or source. Those references were not migrated as current state.
Historical workflow handoff and plan docs include superseded decisions. Current source, current .grace artifacts, README, and package exports were treated as stronger evidence.

Decisions.Decision: Keep .grace as current GRACE 4 state going forward.
Delete pre-migration XML docs after explicit user confirmation.
Keep historical Markdown notes under docs/ as advisory references only.
Delete superseded workflow handoff and workflow plugin plan Markdown notes after explicit user confirmation.
Do not create retroactive C-* change bundles for historical plans or completed work.
Keep function-level START_CONTRACT and START_BLOCK anchors source-local unless a future approved graph design changes that policy.

Validation.Result: lint PASS with 0 errors and 0 warnings after anchor projection fixes.
status PASS as grace4 with 5 context artifacts, 31 graph modules, 31 verification entries, 0 active changes, 0 archived changes, and 0 integrity errors or warnings.
Validation.Note: Some status invocations produced transient bunx FileNotFound errors while copying runtime files; retry succeeded without artifact changes.

GraceMigrationReport.CleanupConfirmation: User approved pre-migration XML doc deletion after the migration commit.
User approved deletion of superseded workflow advisory Markdown docs.
